subject: DevOps
title: The Power of Postmortems
description: One-minute skill: The Power of Postmortems.

hook.text: Google, Etsy, and Netflix publish incident reports. Transparency helps the entire industry.

buildup.text: Public postmortems let everyone learn from one company's mistake. Patterns don't repeat.

discovery.text: Great postmortems include timeline, root cause, impact, and specific action items.

twist.text: Companies that hide incidents repeat them. Those that share improve faster.

climax.text: Blameless culture is key. If people fear punishment, they hide failures. Learning stops.

punchline.text: Share failures openly. The industry learns together.

quiz.question: Why do companies like Google and Netflix share postmortems publicly?
options: To help the entire industry learn from incidents
